phrases.en: Dan walked into the ferry terminal.
He bought a ticket at the counter.
phrases.zh: 他在售票窗口买了一张票。

phrases.en: He checked the schedule for the next ferry.
phrases.zh: 他查看了下一班渡轮的时刻表。

phrases.en: He waited at the dock with the other passengers.
phrases.zh: 他和其他乘客一起在码头等候。

phrases.en: The big ferry slowly pulled in.
phrases.zh: 巨大的渡轮慢慢靠了岸。

phrases.en: A worker lowered the metal ramp.
phrases.zh: 一名工作人员放下了金属舷梯。

phrases.en: Dan showed his ticket and walked up the ramp to board.
phrases.zh: 丹出示了船票，走上舷梯登船。

phrases.en: He found an empty seat on the upper deck.
phrases.zh: 他在上层甲板上找到了一个空座位。

phrases.en: The ferry left the dock and crossed the wide bay.
phrases.zh: 渡轮离开码头，横渡宽阔的海湾。

phrases.en: He quietly watched the blue water during the crossing.
phrases.zh: 渡海途中，他静静地望着蔚蓝的海水。

phrases.en: A cool breeze blew across the deck.
phrases.zh: 一阵凉爽的微风吹过甲板。

phrases.en: Soon, the ferry safely docked on the other side.
phrases.zh: 不久，渡轮平安地停靠在对岸。

phrases.en: Dan walked off the ferry and onto the pier.
phrases.zh: 丹走下渡轮，踏上了码头栈桥。
